title: Demi's Enigmatic Dice
description: Lucky block in RPG style with integration of other mods and new artifacts
body:
![Enigmatic Dice](https://github.com/JrDemiurg/Mods-Assets-/blob/main/EnigmaticDice/Enigmatic_Dice_Title.png?raw=true)

## About:
Lucky block in RPG style as an item with integration of other mods and new artifacts from it.

## For Forge 1.20.1

## Optional Dependencies:

- Alex's Caves
- Alex's Mobs
- Artifacts
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Born in Chaos
- Call of Yucatan
- Demi's Sky Arena
- Enigmatic Legacy
- Integrated Dungeons And Structures
- Jaden's Nether Expansion
- Simply Swords
- Supplementaries
- Terralith
- Terramity
  
## Description:
You can find Enigmatic Dice in chests, including modified ones, with a 10% chance.

You can get them from mobs with a 0.5% chance.

Or obtain them from any block with a 0.1% chance.

Enigmatic Die is also given out when completing achievements with Goal and Challenge frames.

_Now the player has a reason to complete achievements!_

## Artifacts:
New artifacts are sometimes dropped from Enigmatic Dice, but their chance is very small.

The mod does not guarantee that you will collect all of them.

You can only hope that you will get something unique and be happy when it happens.

## Balanced Drop System

Enigmatic Dice drops from mobs and blocks are limited. 

The limit increases with game time — by default, one per 10 minutes (configurable).

_You can track the number of Enigmatic Dice obtained and your total playtime in the in-game statistics_

You also won't be able to build a farm, as Enigmatic Dice only drop when interacting with players.

## Rarity:
The possible events when using Enigmatic Die have levels of rarity: Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Mythical.

## Luck:
The chances of event triggers are determined dynamically.

Now a player's luck affects not only fishing. It also influences the chances of triggering rarer events—it's simple: the higher the luck level, the greater the chances.

However, luck, looting, and fortune do not affect the chance of finding Enigmatic Dice.

## Why Enigmatic Dice in the game?
When creating this mod, I was inspired by Lit RPG books, where the main character might have a slim chance of obtaining a legendary sword even while hunting a rabbit.

This mod won't allow you to simply farm resources.

It is designed to provide a unique experience, so players will use the found Enigmatic Die with bated breath.

You may encounter something new in this game

The mod is designed so as not to break the balance of the game.

## Commands:
/enigmaticDice - to trigger a random event

/enigmaticDice <eventType> - to roll the selected event

/enigmaticDice <eventType> true - to ensure the selected event occurs with a 100% chance

/enigmaticDiceGetLuck - to check the player's current luck level

/enigmaticDiceSimulate <count> - to find out the current chances for each event based on your current luck. You can confidently specify a value of 1,000,000. Results will be provided as a file in the specified location.

## Configs:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

You can:
- enable/disable the event
- change the event chance
- add a new item event
- change the chance of obtaining Dice


</details>


## Your Suggestions:

Currently, there aren't many events in the mod, so I welcome your suggestions in the comments or on the Discord server.
